context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

My logs come in as JSON strings in the body field. I want to extract a field out of that JSON and promote it to a log attribute. I tried body["my_field"] but it throws an INVALID_ARGUMENT error. What's the right approach?

checklist.name: no-shows-a-bare-parsejson-body-line-without-a
checklist.description: Wraps ParseJSON inside an Editor function — specifically set or merge_maps. A response that shows a bare ParseJSON(body) line without an enclosing Editor is a FAIL.
